name: vibecoding-edu
description: VibeCoding Edu - Understand AI-generated code through X-Ray analysis, prompt evaluation, and debugging practice

skills.name: xray
skills.description: Explain AI-generated code line-by-line from a traditional programming perspective. Use when the user wants to understand what code does and why it's structured that way.

skills.name: dojo
skills.description: Generate a debugging challenge by injecting bugs into recent code. Use when the user wants to practice finding and fixing bugs via prompts.

skills.name: analyze
skills.description: Run static analysis on AI coding session history for the current project. Shows prompt-to-file mappings, change frequency, and token usage.
